# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: envoy-gateway # <- Change this to what you want your name to be.
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway  # <- Change this to be the same as your service mesh controller.
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: envoy-gateway # <- Change this to what you want your name to be.
spec:
  gateways:
  - envoy-gateway  # <- Change this to be the same as in Gateway's metadata.name
  hosts: 
  - "*"         # <- Change this to match any request host, not just istio.io
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /v1/products
      gateways:
      - envoy-gateway  # <- Change this to be the same as in Gateway's metadata.name 
    route:
    - destination:
        host: product-backend-svc.default

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: product-backend
spec:
  hosts: [ "product-backend-svc" ]  # <- Change this to what you want your service entry to be named.
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL    # <- Change this value back to MESH_EXTERNAL if you want it in mesh network, or leave as LOCAL_SERVICE for sidecar proxy network.
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http-product
      protocol: HTTP
